title: selaginella digitata
intro: Selaginella digitata, also known as the Finger Spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella digitata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
